name: Mayank Hete
tagline: Building agentic systems for high-stakes domains.
bio_short: Final-year CS engineer at SIT Pune. 3× SCI-indexed researcher building at the intersection of Agentic AI, Post-Quantum Cryptography, and ML governance.
bio_long:
I'm a final-year B.Tech Computer Science student at Symbiosis Institute of Technology, Pune (CGPA: 7.89/10), working at the intersection of Agentic AI, Post-Quantum Cryptography, and ML governance.

My research focuses on quantum-resistant communications and multi-agent LLM systems. I've published three SCI-indexed conference papers at SCI 2026 (Swinburne University, Hanoi, Vietnam, April 2026) — on adaptive PQC key-encapsulation over multipath QUIC, LLM-based courtroom simulation for Indian civil law, and GAN architectures for urban digital twins.

Currently building PIZDA — a Policy Intelligence for Zero-Trust Decision Automation system — an AI governance control plane that intercepts every LLM request to enforce EU AI Act, GDPR, and data sovereignty policies.

Seeking research internships and AI/ML engineering roles in security-focused or LLM-driven product teams.

certifications.name: Full Stack Generative & Agentic AI — Udemy (32.5 hours)
